text.title: Onboarding Program Design Spec Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) that pins the shape of a valid spec artefact. Subagents validate against this before returning.

example.note: Owner is plural pronoun, required fields missing or empty.

forbidden.pattern: `owner` is plural pronoun (`team`, `we`, `us`) or empty string
`rationale` does not cite any entry from `inputs_used`
`inputs_used` is empty AND decision is not 'no-op'
